landing.title: Toon Expo
landing.description: Register for Toon Expo — a celebration of animation and comics. Event date and venue will be announced soon.
landing.registrationDescription: Complete the form below to register. All fields are required.

privacy.title: Privacy policy
privacy.intro: This policy explains how the Toon Expo organizer processes personal data collected through the registration form.

sections.title: Who processes the data
sections.body: The data controller is the Toon Expo event organizer. For requests and to exercise your rights, contact the organizer using the address shown in the registration confirmation email.

sections.title: What we collect
sections.body: First name, last name, email, phone number, selected language, registration questionnaire answers, privacy-consent evidence and policy version, and technical email-delivery status. If you opt in to newsletters, we also store that consent.

sections.title: Why we process data
sections.body: We process data to register you for the event, confirm registration, send organizational messages, and manage event statistics. Marketing emails are sent only with separate consent.

sections.title: Legal basis
sections.body: Processing is based on your voluntary consent, given before registration by accepting this privacy policy.

sections.title: Retention
sections.body: Data is kept for a reasonable organizational period after the event ends, or until a valid deletion request, unless a longer retention is required by law.

sections.title: Who we share data with
sections.body: Data is available only to the authorized administrator and to technical providers needed to run the site, database, and email delivery. We do not sell personal data.

sections.title: Your rights
sections.body: You may request access to your data, correction of errors, or deletion by contacting the organizer. You may also withdraw consent for future processing to the extent permitted by law.

sections.title: Updates
sections.body: This policy may be updated. The version you accepted at registration is stored with your record.

success.title: Registration received
success.description: Thank you for registering for Toon Expo. We have saved your details successfully.

form.phoneHint: Include country code where possible. Armenia numbers often start with +374.

errors.consentRequired: You must agree to the privacy policy.
errors.validation: Please check the highlighted fields and try again.
errors.duplicate: This email is already registered for the event.
errors.rateLimit: Too many attempts. Please wait a moment and try again.
errors.network: Could not reach the server. Check your connection and try again.
errors.server: Something went wrong on our side. Please try again later.
